mapper.sql: user_id, problem_id, wrong_count, last_wrong_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_wrong (user_id, problem_id, wrong_count, last_wrong_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{problemId}, #{wrongCount}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_wrong WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}
mapper.select: SELECT problem_id FROM user_wrong WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY last_wrong_time DESC
SELECT uw.problem_id FROM user_wrong uw INNER JOIN problem p ON uw.problem_id = p.id WHERE uw.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY uw.last_wrong_time DESC
SELECT FROM user_wrong WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY last_wrong_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_wrong uw INNER JOIN problem p ON uw.problem_id = p.id WHERE uw.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1
